results.rendered_html:
carcikā (von carcā) f. Bein. der Durgā  TRIK. 1,1,63 . 3,3,76 . 236 .  H. 206 .  MED. c. 4 . = carcā (aber in welcher Bed. ?)  DVIRŪPAK. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— Vgl. gharmacarcikā und vicarcikā Bezz. von Ausschlägen (vgl. carcā b〉), cārcikya.

results.rendered_html:
carcā, carcikā
1 Repetition, recitation, study, repeated reading, perusal.
2 Discussion, inquiry, investigation.
3 Reflection.
4 Smearing the body with unguents; aṃgacarcāmaracayaṃ  K. 157 ; śrīkhaṃḍacarcā viṣa  Gīt. 9. 
5 An epithet of the goddess Durgā.
